message:
feat(connectors): add inbound bridge for connector signals (ft-3681t.5.7)

Routes inbound connector signals (webhooks, streams, polls, lifecycle,
health checks, failures) into FrankenTerm's EventBus as PatternDetected
events, enabling workflow automation and robot-mode subscriptions.

Includes ConnectorSignal with builder pattern, SignalDeduplicator with
bounded LRU + TTL expiry, ConnectorBridgeTelemetry counters, config
with serde roundtrip support, and 39 unit tests.

Also fixes 2 compile warnings: unused AsyncReadExt import in metrics.rs,
dead_code lint on McpToolError::from_cass_error in mcp_error.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
